subject: kernel: kexec_file: fix error return code of kexec_calculate_store_digests()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC + verifier-v1 artifacts reused from C3 err-5-rep1 (POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec; poc.sha256 matches). Only isErrReturnFunction (P1) kept as the single predicate; P2 (failure-branch goto) and P3 (err untouched in then-block, condition not on err) from the C3 3-predicate plan are inlined verbatim into the final assembly where-clause, using the 'no Assignment at all before goto' formulation (C3 err-5-rep1 iter-2) that handles both literal- and call-RHS assignments. Predicate + final both compile on the first try; final fires only on kexec_calculate_store_digests_buggy (poc.c:65 goto out_free_desc), silent on _fixed. L0 accepts on first successful compile; oracle pair-wise pass (buggy ∧ !fixed ∧ !fp) is recorded but not gated.
